name: Chocolate Ant Sticks
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces chocolate chips or white chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate in a heatproof bowl.
2. Melt over a pot of simmering water, stirring occasionally until smooth.
3. Remove from heat and dip each pretzel rod halfway into the melted chocolate.
4. Immediately roll the chocolate-coated pretzel rods in sprinkles.
5. Transfer to waxed paper-lined sheet pan.
6. Allow to cool until hardened.
Yield: 24 chocolate-coated pretzel rods
